login.authStateError: Auth state error. Please refresh and retry.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.description: This account lacks the required menu, button, data scope or API permission. Please contact the system administrator to adjust role authorization.

detail.title: Details
detail.emptyHint: Select a record on the left to view details and audit log.

error.generic: Failed to load data. Please check backend API or gateway configuration.
error.operationFailed: Operation failed. Please check backend API or gateway configuration.
error.gatewayFailed: Gateway request failed. Please try again later.
error.notImplemented: This action has not been integrated with form workflows. This page currently supports list queries and status actions only.

feature.demoDisabled: Demo data is disabled. This feature page is waiting for backend API integration.

workOrders.title: Work Order Lifecycle
workOrders.description: Covers work order creation, editing, import/sync, release, close, void, details and status log.
workOrders.operationFailed: Work order operation failed. Please check backend API or gateway configuration.

kitting.title: Kitting & Shortage Board
kitting.description: Displays material kitting status, shortage lists and material shortage alerts.

dispatch.title: Dispatch Orders
dispatch.description: Manage production dispatch tasks, process assignment and personnel scheduling.

workOrderExecution.title: Work Order Execution
workOrderExecution.description: Track real-time work order execution status, progress and exceptions.

tasks.title: Production Tasks
tasks.description: Manage the full lifecycle of task dispatch, execution, reporting and completion.

workbench.title: Operation Workbench
workbench.description: Process-level operation, barcode scan reporting and quality data entry.

operatorTerminal.title: Operator Terminal
operatorTerminal.description: Simplified operation interface for frontline operators.

sop.title: Electronic SOP
sop.description: Digital display and version management of standard operating procedures.

rules.title: Barcode Rules
rules.description: Barcode generation rule configuration, code segment definition and rule versioning.

generate.title: Barcode Generation & Print
generate.description: Batch barcode generation by rules, label printing and reprint management.

traceability.title: Scan Traceability
traceability.description: Full product lifecycle traceability, forward and reverse material queries.

monitoring.title: Equipment Monitoring
monitoring.description: Real-time equipment status monitoring, parameter collection and alarm notifications.

ledger.title: Equipment Ledger
ledger.description: Equipment asset archive, technical parameters and lifecycle management.

maintenance.title: Inspection & Maintenance
maintenance.description: Equipment inspection plans, maintenance tasks, repair work orders — full lifecycle.

quality.title: Quality Inspection
quality.description: Incoming, in-process and final inspection with defect handling closed loop.

andon.title: Andon Management
andon.description: Real-time production exception reporting, escalation and resolution closed loop.

report.title: Report Center
report.description: Multi-dimensional reports: output, quality, equipment, traceability and more.

wage.title: Piecework Wage
wage.description: Individual/team piecework wage calculation, rate configuration and wage reports.

process.title: Process Management
process.description: Product routing, BOM, standard labor hours and process document management.

equipment.title: Device Counting & Commissioning Logs
equipment.description: Device count reporting, commissioning, collection logs and failure retry.

erp.title: ERP Task & Route Data Reader
erp.description: ERP production task reading, route data reading, sync logs and failure retry.

api.title: Standard API Data I/O Monitor
api.description: Unit of measure, work orders, tasks, device count reports and completion order monitoring.

dashboard.title: Manufacturing Dashboard
dashboard.description: Plant-wide production overview, KPIs, line status and real-time alerts.

line.title: Line Board
line.description: Single line real-time status, work order progress and quality data.

workshop.title: Workshop Board
workshop.description: Workshop-level production overview, line comparison and key metrics.

controlCenter.title: Control Center Board
controlCenter.description: Plant-wide centralized monitoring display, global KPIs and alerts.

system.title: System Management
system.description: Users, roles, permissions, dictionaries, numbering rules and other basic configuration.
